name: ANC_PER_ABS_ENTRY_ESS_BKUP
description: This table is to backup the absence entry and absence entry details record information for which duration were modified by ESS evaluate absence job

columns.Name: PER_ABS_ENTRY_ESS_BKUP_ID
columns.Comments: Absence entry backup id

columns.Name: PER_ABSENCE_ENTRY_ID
columns.Comments: Absence entry id for which backup record is created

columns.Name: PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: Person Id

columns.Name: BACKUP_RECORD_TYPE
columns.Comments: Backup record type to determine if backup is for absence entry record or absence entry detail record

columns.Name: PER_ABS_ENTRY_DTL_ID
columns.Comments: Absence entry detail if backup is for entry detail record

columns.Name: DURATION
columns.Comments: Duration of absence entry or detail record - Backed up value

columns.Name: DURATION_NEW
columns.Comments: New duration value calculated by the ESS process

columns.Name: START_DATE_DURATION
columns.Comments: Start Date Duration of absence entry - Backed up value

columns.Name: START_DATE_DURATION_NEW
columns.Comments: New start date duration value calculated by the ESS process

columns.Name: END_DATE_DURATION
columns.Comments: End Date Duration of absence entry - Backed up value

columns.Name: END_DATE_DURATION_NEW
columns.Comments: New end date duration value calculated by the ESS process

columns.Name: EMPLOYEE_SHIFT_FLAG
columns.Comments: Employee shift flag of absence entry - Backed up value

columns.Name: EMPLOYEE_SHIFT_FLAG_NEW
columns.Comments: New employee shift flag computed by ESS process

columns.Name: ABS_CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Created by value of absence entry or detail record - Backed up value

columns.Name: ABS_CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Created date value of absence entry or detail record - Backed up value

columns.Name: ABS_LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Last update by value of absence entry or detail record - Backed up value

columns.Name: ABS_LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Last update date value of absence entry or detail record - Backed up value

columns.Name: ABS_OBJECT_VERSION
columns.Comments: Object version number value of absence entry or detail record - Backed up value

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.
